tool_args.label: Total Revenue YTD May 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $377.8 million was $13.8 million lower than the Adopted Budget.

tool_args.label: Preliminary Results - Subject to Adjustment
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are preliminary. Final results will be available in the final Plan. Please note that actuals do not include postclose adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: Standard Performance Indicator Definition
tool_args.raw_text: The Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments: Depreciation, OPEB Expense (GASB 75), Pension Expense (GASB 68), Lease Adjustment (GASB 87), and Environmental Remediation (GASB 49), as well as the NHL share of MTA Police, Business Service Center, and IT costs.

payload.claim_text: The Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments: Depreciation, OPEB Expense (GASB 75), Pension Expense (GASB 68), Lease Adjustment (GASB 87), and Environmental Remediation (GASB 49), as well as the NHL share of MTA Police, Business Service Center, and IT costs.
payload.description: Definition of Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger metrics.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments: Depreciation, OPEB Expense (GASB 75), Pension Expense (GASB 68), Lease Adjustment (GASB 87), and Environmental Remediation (GASB 49), as well as the NHL share of MTA Police, Business Service Center, and IT costs.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Adjusted Performance Indicator Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR, and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. These adjustments are not being used MTA-wide. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenues and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB retiree expenses, and Inclusion of estimated farebox revenue from an equalization of the Connecticut fare structure.

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR, and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenues and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB retiree expenses, and Inclusion of estimated farebox revenue from an equalization of the Connecticut fare structure.
payload.description: Definition of Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger metrics.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR, and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees.
